personal.name: Rutao Luo
personal.title: AI/ML Leader | Asset Management & Finance
personal.tagline: Building intelligent systems at the intersection of AI, finance, and cloud.

summary.label: Investment Technology Leadership
summary.text: 10+ years modernizing investment data/analytics ecosystems and leading cross-functional delivery in asset management (Vanguard) and regulated enterprise AI (Domyn).

summary.label: Multi-Asset Investment Domain
summary.text: Experience across fixed income analytics, investment operations, and market index/reference data standardization (CRSP), supporting portfolio insight and risk management.

summary.label: Platform Modernization
summary.text: Proven track record in migrating legacy analytics to modern, secure, and scalable cloud-native architectures (AWS) and unified big data platforms; integrated structured/unstructured datasets for reliable downstream consumption.

summary.label: AI/ML Innovation
summary.text: Delivered Agentic AI, LLM-driven structured data operations (Text-to-SQL), and hyper-personalization systems that drive revenue and operational alpha.

summary.label: Stakeholder & Roadmap Ownership
summary.text: Translate business needs from senior investment and technology leaders into roadmaps, platform requirements, operating models, and measurable outcomes.

experience.title: Financial AI Specialist/Lead
experience.summary: We deliver end-to-end vertical AI solutions for highly regulated industries, including foundation models, agentic AI systems, and enterprise-grade AI governance.
bullets: Architected an enterprise semantic data layer for regulated financial datasets, enabling governed access across complex schemas and improving interoperability across data domains.
Designed ontology and metadata frameworks to automate data discovery, strengthen lineage visibility, and support consistent Data-as-a-Product standards.

Digital Transformation: Leading end-to-end vertical AI solutions for regulated enterprises, building semantic-layered data models, knowledge graphs, and agentic AI workflows with robust, auditable governance.

Structured Data Agent: Architecting an LLM-driven agent that converts natural-language questions into validated SQL operations, ensuring reliable, non-hallucinatory answers grounded in enterprise datasets.
Unstructured Data Agent: Building a hybrid LLM + Knowledge Graph reasoning system to retrieve and interpret free-form documents using semantic search and contextual understanding.

experience.title: Principal Data Scientist (Equivalent to Senior Manager)
bullets: Strategic Roadmap: Steered the AI/ML vision for investment operations: assessing current workflows/systems and delivering scalable data + decision-support capabilities with engineering and investment stakeholders.

Revenue & Personalization: Successfully implemented AI-driven strategies generating millions in annual revenue and led the design of hyper-personalization systems for millions of investors using MAB and reinforcement learning.

GenAI Leadership: Spearheaded the pilot of GenAI applications (LLM, RAG, RLHF) and established governance frameworks, documentation, and measurement practices for safe adoption of advanced analytics/GenAI capabilities in investment workflows.
Risk & Controls Enablement: Partnered with risk/ops stakeholders to design monitoring and control signals that strengthened detection of anomalous behaviors and improved operational response.
Asset Management Integrity: Implemented a blockchain-based solution to standardize and verify CRSP market index data, ensuring immutability and optimizing auditability for financial stakeholders.
Vendor vs. Build Decisions: Evaluated vendor solutions for fit, scalability, and cost-effectiveness, ensuring alignment with long-term strategic objectives.

experience.title: Senior Data Scientist
bullets: Cloud Transformation: Played a pivotal role in transitioning analytics teams from legacy platforms to a cutting-edge, unified big data platform on the Cloud.
Predictive Forecasting: Enhanced customer experience by providing precise forecasts of phone call demand and recommending optimal staffing strategies to improve service quality.

experience.title: Engineer III - Data Analytics
bullets: Network Optimization: Led advanced modeling and analysis for Comcast's next-generation network budget, establishing a foundation for future infrastructure scalability.

experience.title: Research Control System Engineer (New Product Introduction)
bullets: GE's Trip Optimizer: Applied mathematical modeling and optimization techniques to generate optimal trip plans for train journeys, contributing to significant improvements in operational efficiency.
Real-Time Embedded Control Systems: Designed and implemented real-time control algorithms tailored for embedded systems, ensuring the seamless integration of the Trip Optimizer into locomotives.

experience.title: Research Assistant
bullets: Computational Disease Modeling: Developed mathematical models to describe disease systems and employed nonlinear control techniques to analyze system dynamics, resulting in the identification of innovative therapeutic strategies.

Antiviral Resistance Dynamics: Investigated approaches to extend the efficacy of HAART (Highly Active Antiretroviral Therapy) for HIV treatment by preventing the emergence of drug-resistant viral strains.

Scholarly Publications & Media Impact: Achieved notable academic success by publishing as the first author in five world-class journals and presenting research findings in five refereed conference papers. These contributions garnered significant attention from prominent media outlets, including Science Daily and NPR.

education.degree: Master of Science in Electrical Engineering
Master of Science in Applied Mathematics
Bachelor of Science in Control Engineering

certifications.name: SAS Certified Base Programmer for SAS 9
SAS Certified Advanced Programmer for SAS 9
Actuarial Science: Pass of Exams P, FM

about: I am an AI and data leader with 10+ years of experience building modern investment data, analytics, and decisioning platforms in financial services. My work spans asset management at Vanguard and regulated enterprise AI at Domyn, where I have led initiatives across fixed income analytics, investment operations, cloud modernization, semantic data architecture, and LLM-powered systems.

I specialize in connecting business strategy with scalable technical execution — translating complex investment and data challenges into governed platforms, AI-ready architectures, and high-impact products. My experience includes modernizing legacy analytics environments, integrating structured and unstructured data, building semantic and metadata frameworks, and delivering AI/ML solutions such as agentic systems, Text-to-SQL, and personalization capabilities.

With more than 9 years at Vanguard, I bring deep knowledge of investment data, governance, and investor-focused use cases, along with a proven ability to align senior stakeholders, mentor teams, and drive practical innovation in highly regulated environments. In addition to my industry work, I have authored over a dozen research papers with more than 300 citations, reflecting a strong foundation in analytical rigor, innovation, and applied problem solving.

paragraphs: I find genuine satisfaction in mentoring — taking something complex and making it click for someone else. Outside of meetings and models, that often looks like a robotics kit on the kitchen table with my kids, which is as good a test of patience and creativity as any professional challenge.

I stay curious through reading — finance, AI, and the occasional deep dive into how large systems break and recover. Travel and photography round out the picture: both are good reminders that the most interesting things are usually hiding in plain sight.
